name: Naturepedia Plant Electrophysiology Map
description: Paid Naturepedia machine-readable relationship map connecting plant bioelectricity, electrical signaling, action potentials, variation potentials, membrane voltage, ion channels, signal propagation, electrical defense, Plant Communication™, Mycorrhizal Networks™, Electrical Ecology™, and the Electro-Ecology Mesh.
architecture: Plant Intelligence → Plant Communication → Plant Electrophysiology → Electrical Signaling → Action Potentials → Variation Potentials → Membrane Voltage → Ion Channels → Signal Propagation → Electrical Defense → Mycorrhizal Networks → Electrical Ecology → Bioelectric Ecology → Electro-Ecology Mesh

systemNodes.name: Plant Electrophysiology™
systemNodes.role: Parent system for plant electrical signaling.

systemNodes.name: Action Potentials
systemNodes.role: Rapid electrical impulses supporting plant responses.

systemNodes.name: Variation Potentials
systemNodes.role: Long-distance electrical responses associated with stress and injury.

systemNodes.name: Membrane Voltage
systemNodes.role: Voltage gradients across plant cell membranes.

systemNodes.name: Ion Channels
systemNodes.role: Control movement of ions responsible for electrical signaling.

systemNodes.name: Signal Propagation
systemNodes.role: Transmission of electrical information throughout plant tissues.

systemNodes.name: Plant Nervous System Analogy
systemNodes.role: Conceptual comparison illustrating distributed plant signaling.

systemNodes.name: Electrical Defense
systemNodes.role: Electrical activation of plant defense pathways.

systemNodes.name: Future Plant Electrophysiology
systemNodes.role: Emerging research directions and ecological applications.
